confidence_rationale: Clear view of most phases with good camera angles. Suture placement deviation measurements estimated from available views. Knot quality and hand switching clearly observed. Timing well-established from video sequence.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurements for suture deviation due to camera angle limitations
Precise tension assessment during knot tying phases
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with rapid completion time and proper technique. Clean surgeon's knot followed by alternating single throws. Minor placement deviations only penalties observed.
strengths: Rapid expert-level completion time (72s vs 80-120s expert benchmark)
Perfect hand alternation sequence across all three throws
Clean surgeon's knot with proper double throw
Efficient needle loading and suture placement phases
Complete slit closure with no gap visible
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise needle placement at marked targets
Consider perpendicular approach angle to minimize placement deviation
